title: orchestrate-program
purpose: C4.2 defines orchestrate program for the agent-driven expert system. Product execution — pipelines, tasks, program, delivery.
scope: Owns `C4.2` only; siblings under `C4` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §5 — Branch C — Product execution plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#5-branch-c-product-execution-plane).
behavior_steps: Before spawning workers, the conductor runs Librarian (readonly) and receives at most five `allowed_reads` paths derived from `state.json`, the active task card, and scoped playbooks per [F6.2](F6.2-role-allowed-reads-scoped-playbooks-lane-tasks.md).
Spawn contracts pass `allowed_reads` unchanged to economy workers; workers must not open paths outside the list except through declared tool output captured as evidence.

When context is insufficient, compose-first routing ([E2.1](E2.1-compose-resolve-capability-needed.md)–[E2.4](E2.4-compose-plan-task-card-components.md)) ranks catalog components and playbooks instead of expanding the read set beyond the cap.
The genius-tier conductor may read INDEX files and task cards beyond worker bounds but still prefers bounded briefing over loading entire design trees during orchestration turns.

Scope-bleed attempts—workers reading forbidden paths or conductors omitting `allowed_reads` from spawn contracts—fail closed as [G5.2](G5.2-mistake-scope-creep-allowed-reads-task-card.md) violations and stop at H2 until spawn contracts are corrected and dual-written.
edge_cases: Operator closes laptop mid-loop â€” state.json must resume from last good dual-write.
Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Edge case `C4.2` variant 3: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Edge case `C4.2` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `C4.2`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Map `C4.2` to v2.14â€“v2.23 release row in SEC-15-index.md.
Create or extend S0 script if behavior is file-derived.
Add unit test under tests/unit/test_c4_2.py when script exists.
Validate `C4.2` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `C4.2` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `C4.2`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: C4.2 defines orchestrate program for the agent-driven expert system. Product execution — pipelines, tasks, program, delivery. In practice, the system before spawning workers, the conductor runs librarian (readonly) and receives at most five `allowed_reads` paths derived from `state.json`, the active task card, and scoped playbooks per [f6.2](f6.2-role-allowed-reads-scoped-playbooks-lane-tasks.md), then spawn contracts pass `allowed_reads` unchanged to economy workers; workers must not open paths outside the list except through declared tool output captured as evidence.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-c 2026-06-28 -->

Orchestrate-program skill spawns ready lanes when manifest approved, blocking questions cleared, and spawn_workers true. Each lane worker receives allowed_reads from Librarian briefing and manifest slice only.

Parent conductor merges lane summaries, updates artifact graph, and never clears gates without approval. Failed lane blocks program goal_verify until manifest reconciliation or H2 waiver.
